news_results.title: Hurricanes eager to regain pre-Olympic form vs. streaking Lightning - CBS Sports
news_results.description: It will be the first game since the Olympic break for the Hurricanes, who had several players participating in the Milan Cortina Games in Italy and three medalists. Tampa Bay also has an Olympic shine: forward Jake Guentzel, who briefly played for Carolina and was a member of the United States' gold-medal team, and coach Jon Cooper, who guided Canada to the silver medal. Yet Cooper isn't back with the Lightning ...
